sessions.title: Start of Online Classes
sessions.body: Online classes will start on September 6th to 15th due to the bar exam thank you and please comply.

sessions.title: Long weekend
sessions.body: Enjoy your long weekend as of 23 to 26 there will be no school!

sessions.title: Campus Tour for Freshmen
sessions.body: We are having our CAMPUS TOUR tomorrow August 16, 2024, call time is 9:30am, assembly area will be on MT and the event proper or CPUR orientation will take place at RMA at 1:00 PM

sessions.title: Welcome to CS Compass
sessions.body: Hello Students!!! We are happy that you're using the app developed by the students of CCS, The purpose of this app is to guide you, so use well, Enjoy your time here in CPU!!!
